The '''director''' of [[Harlequin Station]] was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual who was in charge of deliveries to and from Harlequin Station during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was also in charge of Station defenses. When the [[XQ1 Platform|station]] came under attack by the [[Viraxo Industries|Viraxo]], he called upon the aid of the [[Azzameen family]], who were in the [[Star system/Legends|system]] on a delivery run. Siblings [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]] and [[Aeron Azzameen]], flying the family's [[Sabra|two]] [[Selu|identical]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Transport/Legends|transports]] managed to chase off the [[Enkidu|invading]] [[Gilgam|ships]]. Thankful, the Director offed his gratitude.
